query:
SELECT 
  u.id as user_id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.role,
  c.id as contrato_id,
  c.valorVenda,
  c.createdAt
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN contratos c ON c.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%Nunes%'
ORDER BY u.email, c.createdAt DESC;
